# mixpanel_dataset (Data Source)

Fetches a Mixpanel dataset by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mixpanel_dataset" "events" {
  project_id = 1234567
  dataset_id = "my_dataset"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dataset_id` (String)
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `dataset_secrets` (Attributes List)
- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
